arts.ttl: Norwich City boss delivers Hull City verdict diehards will agree is one of biggest frustrations
arts.sum: I know they changed a little bit in the game yesterday (Wednesday) evening against Burnley from first half to second half, but it's been consistent in how they want to build the game, press and stuff like that. "We know that Hull (City) also try to build the game and have their rotations inside the middle to create some space for their wingers on the outside, so our pressing game needs to be good as well.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach delivers verdict on survival chances with 'character' assessment
arts.sum: "We need to start winning football matches if we want to be out of that and we have been a bit of in and out and show character to move forward. Ruben Selles believes he has the characters in his dressing room to drag Hull City away from relegation trouble at the wrong end of the Championship.

arts.ttl: Two more Norwich games moved to allow for TV coverage
arts.sum: Norwich City's matches against Bristol City and Sheffield Wednesday have been moved to allow for Sky Sports television coverage of the former.

arts.ttl: Norwich City hit by fitness worries to key men ahead of crucial Hull City trip
arts.sum: Norwich will also be without Emi Marcondes, and there are some doubts surrounding influential skipper Kenny McLean after he was forced to miss the defeat in midweek shortly before kick-off in Norfolk, while Onel Hernandez is back in light training but won't be risked. Boss Johannes Hoff Thorup says influential forward Marcelino Nunez, who bagged the first goal in the 4-0 thumping against the Tigers in October, will be sidelined with a sore ankle.
